_comment: Worldview tree for the train to crazy town. Nodes are GET-OFF POINTS (a fixed set of moral assumptions); edges are CRUCIAL-CONSIDERATION FLIPS (one step of moral expansion / one more bullet bitten). The decision rule never changes: every node ranks the SAME donation slate by expected welfare-adjusted DALYs averted per dollar. Only the assumptions change, so the winner ('top_pick') changes as you ride down. This file is the single starting path; BRANCHING is still TBD (see README) so for now it is one spine plus a marked fork point.
slate: AI safety (MIRI / MATS / LTFF - slot TBD)

nodes.desc: Least-crazy end of the line. Moral weight only on people near me; heavy pure-time discount; humans only; only near-certain, measurable effects count. Under these assumptions distant strangers, animals and the future are discounted to ~0, so the local/civic option wins. You can get off right here.
Flip: drop the nationality discount. A life saved abroad counts like a life saved at home, so cheap, measurable global-health and cash interventions dominate the local option by ~100x.

Flip: extend the moral circle to farmed vertebrates, weighted by a sentience-adjusted welfare range. Corporate welfare campaigns avert enormous amounts of suffering per dollar and overtake human global health under most welfare-range estimates.

Flip: count invertebrates, with welfare range ~ (neuron count)^exponent. This is the first UNSTABLE stop: sweeping the exponent from 0 to 2 swings shrimp welfare range across ~12 orders of magnitude, and the ranking flips. Marked subgraph: clicking here should open the soil-animal sub-tree (macroarthropods / microarthropods / nematodes, each with its own conditions) - TBD.
Flip: stop discounting future lives. Reducing global-catastrophic and civilisational-collapse risk protects vast numbers of future people, so resilience bets start to dominate present-focused giving.

Last marked stop on this spine: accept the astronomical-waste argument and take small-probability / huge-payoff bets at face value. Existential-risk reduction dominates everything. This is the far end Cotra's near-termist deliberately gets off before; ride further and you reach fanaticism / Pascal's-mugging territory.

_branching_TODO: This is one canonical spine. Real branching (accept/reject a consideration; multi-way settings of a parameter like the neuron-count exponent; alternative orderings) is undecided - see README 'Branching - TBD'. Nodes flagged subgraph:true are where a child tree opens once branching lands.
